Requirements for Graduation: • Final 30 credits must be earned at UMD

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level

3/3&1 • 12 of the final 30 credits must be upper level major coursework

0 • A minimum 2.00 cumulative UM GPA and satisfactory completion of all degree 0 requirements are required for graduation 0 • Students matriculating after Fall 2012 must have a 2.0 minimum GPA for all 4 degree requirements, minor requirements, and undergraduate certificate requirements 4 (Major courses are defined as: departmental courses, basic sciences, engineering 3 sciences, specified degree tracks, technical requirements/ technical electives and
